PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-29-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Murphy for Abadesa Galatoire.

The Court informed Counsel that the revised order he submitted was still not correct. Mr. Murphy submitted another revised order in open Court. The Petition for Spousal Property was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chen.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Continued To Mar-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Murphy for Abadesa Galatoire.

Mr. Murphy provided the Court with a revised order and stated that he did mailing of the petition on the 18th of January. The Petition for Spousal Property was taken under submission pending filing of an amended Proof of Service.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
